news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust New Constructs Core Earnings Leaders ETF

holdings.infoBox: FTCE is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Seagate Technology Holdings stock at 5.12%, QUALCOMM at 5.02%, International Business Machines at 4.23%, Meta Platforms at 3.88%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 3.81%.

overview.description: The First Trust New Constructs Core Earnings Leaders ETF (FTCE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies with high earnings quality, as selected and measured using the Earnings Capture metric. The fund holds 100 securities, representing the top companies within each Bloomberg sector classification. FTCE was launched on Oct 2, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Bloomberg New Constructs Core Earnings Leaders Index

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust New Constructs Core Earnings Leaders ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
